summary: PLM Phases 2-5 Backend Testing - All 37/37 tests PASSED after bug fix. Tested: Sprints (CRUD, board, burndown), Dependencies, Milestones, Gantt data, Programs, Portfolios with health, Time tracking/timesheets, Automation rules/triggers, Recurring tasks, Custom fields (dropdown/text/number), Custom values on tasks, Field templates, PLM config.
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 2-5 PLM endpoints working correctly
Sprint burndown properly calculates points/tasks remaining
Automation triggers endpoint returns 7 triggers and 6 actions as expected
Portfolio health endpoint correctly returns green/yellow/red based on overdue count
Custom field values stored as nested object on task custom_fields.{field_id}
Field templates correctly snapshot current project fields

bugs_fixed.issue: Burndown endpoint crashed with TypeError when story_points was None instead of missing
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed t.get('story_points', 0) to (t.get('story_points') or 0) to handle explicit None values

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed data: sprint, dependencies, milestone, program, portfolio, time entry, automation rule, recurring task config, and custom fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: PLM Phases 2-5 fully tested. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_plm_phases_2_5.py. Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://ai-chat-recovery.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_plm_phases_2_5.py -v. All endpoints working: sprints CRUD + board + burndown, task dependencies, milestones, gantt data, programs, portfolios + health, time entries + timesheet, automation rules/triggers, recurring tasks, custom fields (all types), custom values on tasks, field templates, plm-config.

phase_2_sprints.GET /api/projects/{id}/sprints: PASS - Lists with task_count, total_points, tasks_done
phase_2_sprints.GET /api/sprints/{id}/board: PASS - Returns tasks grouped by todo/in_progress/review/done
phase_2_sprints.GET /api/sprints/{id}/burndown: PASS - Returns total_points, done_points, remaining_points, tasks counts

phase_2_dependencies.POST /api/tasks/dependencies: PASS - Creates dependency link with type
phase_2_dependencies.GET /api/tasks/{id}/dependencies: PASS - Returns blocks and blocked_by arrays

phase_2_milestones.GET /api/projects/{id}/milestones: PASS - Lists with task_count and tasks_done

phase_3_programs.POST /api/workspaces/{ws}/programs: PASS - Creates program with project_ids array

phase_3_portfolios.POST /api/portfolios: PASS - Creates portfolio with program_ids array

phase_4_time_tracking.GET /api/my-timesheet: PASS - Returns entries, total_hours, by_day breakdown

phase_4_automations.POST /api/projects/{id}/automations: PASS - Creates automation rule with trigger/conditions/actions

phase_4_recurring_tasks.POST /api/projects/{id}/recurring-tasks: PASS - Creates recurring config with template/interval/next_creation

phase_5_custom_values.POST /api/tasks/{id}/custom-values: PASS - Sets custom field value on task

phase_5_field_templates.POST /api/projects/{id}/field-templates: PASS - Saves current fields as template

phase_5_plm_config.GET /api/plm-config: PASS - Returns sprint_statuses, dependency_types, milestone_statuses, custom_field_types, portfolio_health_levels
